'''Tarrant Snil''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] customs officer who worked in [[Lay Pa-Sidian]] on [[G'wenee/Legends|G'wenee]]. As part of his plan to ingratiate himself with [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], [[Kir Kanos]] captured Snil under the guise of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Kir Kanos|Kenix Kil]]. Upon returning Snil to Grappa, Snil was handed over to the ferocious [[Zanibar]].
